detailed_explanation: Harmonious, amicable, friendly. Literary/archaic term for warm human relations.
example_sentences: 藹々たる雰囲気 - Harmonious atmosphere
藹として接する - Treat warmly
藹然たる風 - Amicable atmosphere
usage_notes: 藹々 (aiai) = harmonious. Rare kanji, often in set phrases. Literary/formal contexts.

detailed_explanation: Mutual quarrel, falling out, dispute between parties.
example_sentences: 合いくを生じる - A quarrel arises
合いくの種 - Seed of discord
合いくを避ける - Avoid disputes
usage_notes: 合いく = mutual dispute. Literary/archaic. Modern: 口論、喧嘩.

detailed_explanation: Greeting, social courtesy, formal address. N1 level review with nuanced usage.
example_sentences: 挨拶状 - Letter of greeting
挨拶回りをする - Make rounds of greetings
一言挨拶 - Brief greeting
usage_notes: 挨拶 N1 = formal/professional contexts. Business greetings, official letters.

detailed_explanation: Autumn, fall. N1 level in literary/metaphorical contexts.
example_sentences: 秋の夕暮れ - Autumn evening
人生の秋 - Autumn of life (old age)
秋の空 - Autumn sky (fickle weather)
usage_notes: 秋 = N5 literal. N1 = metaphors: 人生の秋 (senior years), 秋の空 (unreliable weather/behavior).

detailed_explanation: To abandon hope, resign oneself, give up. N1 nuance: philosophical acceptance.
example_sentences: 諦めがつく - Come to accept/reconcile
諦めの境地 - State of resignation
諦め悪く続ける - Persist despite setbacks
usage_notes: 諦める N1 = 諦めがつく (psychological acceptance), 諦めの悪さ (persistence).

detailed_explanation: Ash, ashes; cremated remains. N1 in Buddhist/funeral contexts.
example_sentences: 遺骨を収める - Collect cremated remains
灰になる - Turn to ashes
灰皿ではなく灰 - Cremated remains (not ashtray)
usage_notes: 灰 = ash. N1 funeral context. Important Japanese Buddhist funeral customs. 納骨 (placing ashes).

detailed_explanation: To open, become open. N1 review with literary/abstract usages.
example_sentences: 心が開く - Heart opens up
視野が開く - Horizons broaden
新しい道が開く - New path opens
usage_notes: 開く N1 abstract: 心が開く (psychological), 視野が開く (intellectual). Metaphorical openings.

detailed_explanation: Ash content, quality of ash. Technical term in chemistry/geology.
example_sentences: 灰質を測定する - Measure ash content
灰質の多い石炭 - High ash coal
灰質分析 - Ash analysis
usage_notes: 灰質 = technical chemistry term. Quality/quantity of ash residue.

detailed_explanation: Working busily but inefficiently; fussing anxiously. N1 formal/literary.
example_sentences: 齷齪としても無駄 - Futile to fuss
齷齪せずに行動する - Act without fuss
齷齪した性格 - Fussy personality
usage_notes: 齷齪 = literary/kanji-formal. あくせく same meaning. Anxious busy-ness. Written style.

detailed_explanation: Yawn. N1 in formal/written descriptions of behavior/psychology.
example_sentences: 欠伸を噛み殺す - Stifle a yawn
欠伸が出るほど退屈 - Boring enough to yawn
欠伸連発 - Repeated yawning
usage_notes: 欠伸 = formal kanji for yawn. 噛み殺す (suppress) = polite social behavior. Business manners.

detailed_explanation: Nightmare, bad dream. N1 metaphorical: terrible experience.
example_sentences: 悪夢に魘される - Be tormented by nightmares
悪夢のような経験 - Nightmare experience
悪夢から覚める - Awaken from nightmare
usage_notes: 悪夢 = bad dream. Metaphorical: 悪夢のような (nightmarish). 魘される = be haunted.

detailed_explanation: Shallow (water/depth); superficial (knowledge/experience). N1 abstract.
example_sentences: 浅い知識 - Superficial knowledge
考えが浅い - Thinking is shallow
人生経験が浅い - Life experience is shallow
usage_notes: 浅い N1 = superficial (not deep). 浅はか (asahaka) = shallow/foolish. Abstract depth.

detailed_explanation: Pale yellow, light cream, yellowish tint. Traditional Japanese color term.
example_sentences: 浅黄色の着物 - Pale yellow kimono
浅黄に染める - Dye pale yellow
浅黄の空 - Creamy yellow sky
usage_notes: 浅黄 = traditional color name. 浅 (light/pale) + 黄 (yellow). Aesthetic nuance.

detailed_explanation: Birthmark, nevus; bruise, contusion. Medical and folklore contexts.
example_sentences: 痣がある - Have birthmark
痣を消す - Remove birthmark
打撲痣 - Bruise from hit
usage_notes: 痣 = birthmark or bruise. Japanese folklore: 三つ痣 (three birthmarks) = reincarnation sign.

detailed_explanation: Vivid, bright, fresh, colorful; skillful, clear (memory/impression).
example_sentences: 鮮やかな色 - Vivid color
鮮やかに覚えている - Remember clearly
鮮やかな技 - Skillful technique
usage_notes: 鮮やか = vivid/bright. Colors, memories, skills. Positive vividness. 鮮度 = vividness/quality.

detailed_explanation: Leg (furniture/base); means of transport; handwriting stroke order; acting ability.
example_sentences: 机の脚 - Table leg
脚が悪い - Poor performance
脚を運ぶ - Travel (lit: move legs)
脚光を浴びる - Be in spotlight
usage_notes: 脚 vs 足: 脚 = furniture legs, acting skills, base. 脚光 (kyakkō) = spotlight/lime light.

detailed_explanation: Reed, rush (plant). Literary/poetic contexts. Symbol of flexibility.
example_sentences: 葦が揺れる - Reeds sway
葦原 - Reed field
葦のように曲がる - Bend like reed
usage_notes: 葦 = reed. Classical literature imagery. Bible: 葦の舟 (ark of bulrushes).

detailed_explanation: Footprints; evidence; one's career path; legacy left behind.
example_sentences: 歴史に足跡を残す - Leave mark on history
足跡をたどる - Follow tracks
偉大な足跡 - Great legacy
usage_notes: 足跡 N1 = metaphorical legacy. 足跡を踏む (step in footsteps) = follow predecessor.

detailed_explanation: Pace, gait of walking; coordination, unity (group action).
example_sentences: 足並みを揃える - Get in step/coordinate
足並みが揃わない - Not coordinated
足並みを速める - Quicken pace
usage_notes: 足並み = literal gait AND group coordination. Politics/business: 足並みを揃える = unified action.

detailed_explanation: Azuki beans, red beans. Deep cultural significance in Japanese sweets.
example_sentences: 小豆を炊く - Cook azuki beans
あずき色 - Reddish-brown color
小豆大福 - Azuki bean mochi
usage_notes: 小豆 = azuki. Japanese sweets (和菓子) culture. 小豆茶 (azuki tea). Lucky food in some regions.
